scripts.build: HUGO_VERSION=0.154.5 && wget -q https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases/download/v${HUGO_VERSION}/hugo_extended_${HUGO_VERSION}_linux-amd64.tar.gz -O /tmp/hugo.tar.gz && tar -xzf /tmp/hugo.tar.gz -C /tmp && /tmp/hugo --gc --minify && npm run indexnow
scripts.indexnow: URLS=$(grep -oP '(?<=<loc>)[^<]+' public/sitemap.xml | python3 -c "import sys,json; urls=[u.strip() for u in sys.stdin]; print(json.dumps({'host':'blog.ansicode.fr','key':'0e146327f6e14954c557d231cbf56ca9868393b353f4b54f7efb1ac34a783979','urlList':urls}))") && curl -s -X POST 'https://api.indexnow.org/indexnow' -H 'Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8' -d "$URLS" -o /dev/null -w 'IndexNow: %{http_code}\n'
